template:
module Main where
import Control.Exception (try, SomeException, evaluate)
import System.IO (hSetBuffering, stdout, BufferMode(NoBuffering))
import Data.Monoid (Sum(..), Product(..))

class TupleZip t where
  zipTuplesN :: (a -> a -> a) -> a -> [t a] -> t a

instance TupleZip (,) where
  zipTuplesN f z ts = [[SLOT pair_zip]]

instance TupleZip (,,) where
  zipTuplesN f z ts = 
    ( foldl f z [[SLOT triple_first]]
    , foldl f z [y | (_,y,_) <- ts]
    , foldl f z [w | (_,_,w) <- ts]
    )

instance TupleZip (,,,) where
  zipTuplesN f z ts = 
    ( foldl f z [x | (x,_,_,_) <- ts]
    , foldl f z [y | (_,y,_,_) <- ts]
    , foldl f z [w | (_,_,w,_) <- ts]
    , foldl f z [v | (_,_,_,v) <- ts]
    )

instance TupleZip (,,,,) where
  zipTuplesN f z ts = 
    ( foldl f z [x | (x,_,_,_,_) <- ts]
    , foldl f z [y | (_,y,_,_,_) <- ts]
    , foldl f z [w | (_,_,w,_,_) <- ts]
    , foldl f z [v | (_,_,_,v,_) <- ts]
    , foldl f z [u | (_,_,_,_,u) <- ts]
    )

zipTuples2 :: [((Int, Int))] -> (Int -> Int -> Int) -> (Int, Int)
zipTuples2 ts f = [[SLOT zip2_call]]

zipTuples3 :: [(String, String, String)] -> (String -> String -> String) -> (String, String, String)
zipTuples3 ts f = zipTuplesN f "" ts

zipTuples4 :: [(Int, Int, Int, Int)] -> (Int -> Int -> Int) -> (Int, Int, Int, Int)
zipTuples4 ts f = [[SLOT zip4_call]]

main :: IO ()
main = kataMain

slots.name: pair_zip
slots.answer: (foldl f z (map fst ts), foldl f z (map snd ts))
decoys: (foldr f z (map fst ts), foldr f z (map snd ts))
(foldl f z ts, foldl f z ts)

prompt: Pick the pair zip, the 3-tuple comprehension, and the two zipTuplesN call shapes.
